name: mortgage-position-inferred-balance-lender-match
rationale: Broker email mentions refinance + lender (RBC) but does NOT state mortgage_position. mortgage_statement doc shows RBC as existing lender with $225k balance. loan_application doc lender_name matches RBC. F1.MP inference path: when broker_correction + broker_initial_intent are empty AND transaction_type='refinance' AND existing-mortgage-lender matches across sources, infer mortgage_position from balance presence (R10-G + R11-A refinance carve-out). Tests cross-field inference for missing canonical field.
notes: Single-event sequence. Cross-family inference scenario — F1.MP value derived from F1.EL + F1.FB co-presence + TT context.
